exceptions.reason: PR24 is the prerequisite Opus consult subsystem baseline required before OPUS_ADVISORY_COVERAGE_PLAN_AND_ACCEPTANCE_MATRIX_V1. The exception is branch-scoped and limited to additive volume and duplicate-window checks only.

PR51 is the SkillOps portable v4 baseline branch and predates the current modularity thresholds. The exception is branch-scoped, standalone-only, and limited to modularity-policy so the legacy baseline can land without a destabilizing late refactor.
